title: Elite Bans
description: The most advanced admin tool, with a web-panel interface.
body:
Elite Bans
Modern, network-wide punishment control with a premium, integrated web panel.

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a08fbcfd639b00c77fefcd9c2de078d1b91f1923_0.webp)

🧬 Overview

Elite Bans is a next-generation moderation suite for serious Minecraft servers and networks.

It combines powerful in-game tools with a sleek, browser-based control panel so your staff can manage bans, mutes, kicks, warnings, and notes from anywhere—without clunky commands, outdated GUIs, or messy spreadsheets.

Drop it in, connect your servers, open the panel, and you’ve got a central, live, searchable moderation hub that actually looks and feels like modern software.

⭐ Core Features

✅ Advanced Punishment System

Full support for bans, tempbans, mutes, tempmutes, kicks, warnings, and notes.

Rich metadata: reason, staff, duration, timezone-aware timestamps, silent/staff-only flags.

Configurable templates for common reasons & durations for faster, consistent staff actions.

Appeal-friendly history – clean, searchable records for every player.

🌐 Network-Ready by Design

Built for multi-server & proxy setups (BungeeCord, Velocity, multi-Paper stack).

Automatic cross-network sync of punishments and player history.

Smart caching to keep lookups fast and reduce database overhead.

📊 Integrated Web Panel

A modern, dark, dashboard-style interface inspired by professional control centers:

View live punishment stats, active bans/mutes, and recent actions at a glance.

One-click ban/mute/kick from the browser, with full audit logging.

Filter and search by IGN, UUID, staff, IP (optional), reason, server, or date.

Instance status, sync health, and connected servers in real time.

Responsive layout: works great on desktop, laptop, or tablet.

🔐 Serious About Security

API key–based authentication for each server instance.

Role-based access for panel users (Owner / Sr. Mod / Mod / Helper).

Optional IP locking and action logging for every panel event.

Configurable data retention and export options.

⚙ Highly Configurable

Clean YAML configuration.

Toggle modules (warnings, notes, IP bans, sync, etc.) individually.

Customize messages, prefixes, reasons, and durations to match your brand.

Plays nicely with your permission plugin, proxy, and existing infrastructure.

🖥 Commands & Permissions

(Defaults, all configurable.)

Examples

/eban <player> <duration> <reason> – Ban player.

/emute <player> <duration> <reason> – Mute player.

/ekick <player> <reason> – Kick player.

/ewarn <player> <reason> – Issue a warning.

/elitebans history <player> – View history.

/elitebans reload – Reload configuration.

/elitebans sync – Force sync with the network/panel.

Key Permissions

elitebans.admin – Full access & management.

elitebans.moderate – Standard staff tools (ban/mute/kick/warn).

elitebans.view – View history & active punishments.

elitebans.bypass – Exempt trusted accounts from punishments (optional).

📦 Installation

Use a modern Paper / Purpur / Spigot server (Paper recommended).

Drop EliteBans.jar into your /plugins folder.

Restart the server to generate config files.

Configure:

Database / storage.

Network sync (if using multiple servers).

API credentials for the web panel.

Run /elitebans reload and start moderating.

No client mods required. Fully server-side.

🔮 Roadmap

Web panel user management inside Minecraft (link accounts with one command).

Advanced analytics: ban trends, alt detection integrations, staff performance stats.

PlaceholderAPI & audit webhooks (Discord / dashboards).

Optional white-label / branding mode for premium setups.

Elite Bans is built for networks that expect their tools to look and function like real infrastructure, not a collection of random commands.
Give your staff a trustworthy, professional, centralized punishment system—and give your players a clear, consistent moderation experience.
